description: Create a two-column case study content slide on Project Chime with opportunity overview and key investment metrics on the left, and investment thesis and investment update bullet lists on the right.

header.headline: Case Study: Project Chime
header.sub: GP-led single-asset continuation vehicle of leading postpaid mobile virtual network operator

steps.label: Opportunity Overview
steps.sub:
Closed: December 9, 2025
Leading U.S. postpaid mobile virtual network operator primarily serving the 55+ demographic
Operates nationwide, leveraging an exclusive wholesale network agreement with AT&T to deliver cellular coverage to 99% of the US population
GTCR: Chicago-based firm investing in high-growth sectors; PEG has had relationship since 1980 and holds an Advisory Board seat

steps.label: Key Investment Metrics
steps.sub:
10.3x — Entry EBITDA Multiple
36% — Entry EBITDA Margin
6.2x — Entry Net Debt Leverage Ratio

items.text: Recognized for its prominent brand within the senior community
Longstanding GP relationship and known asset
Well-positioned for significant growth through a variety of strategic initiatives
Strong GP and management alignment with high performing management team
Since 2021, churn has remained low at ~1.4% monthly
Recent investments in marketing, product expansion, and retail footprint to drive growth

footer.source: This example is included solely to illustrate strategies which have been utilized by PEG. It is expected that the portfolio will include a larger number of investments than the example set forth. There can be no guarantee or assurance that the portfolio will be able to make similar investments on similar terms in the future. Not all investments had or will have similar results. Logos presented are registered trademarks of their respective companies. 1 Key investment metrics at time of closing 12/9/2025. EBITDA multiple based on May 2025 EBITDA. 2 Investment updates as of closing 12/9/2025.
